task: What is on my schedule for October 18 2023 at 9:45am in Simple Calendar Pro? Answer with the titles only. If there are multiples titles, format your answer in a comma separated list.

steps.thought:
[Observation]
The current screen is the phone's home screen. Visible apps include Gmail, Photos, YouTube, Phone, Messages, Chrome, and another Gmail shortcut. The Simple Calendar Pro app is not visible on this screen.

[Plan]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app → | Step 2: Navigate to October 18, 2023 | Step 3: Check the schedule at 9:45 am | Step 4: Extract and format the event titles.

[Decision]
Based on the observation, the target app "Simple Calendar Pro" is not on the current home screen page. Since the system provides an "Open" action for apps that might not be immediately visible on the home screen dock or shortcuts, I will initiate the opening of the Simple Calendar Pro app directly to proceed with finding the schedule.

[Memory]
First action, no prior memory.

[Observation]
The screen displays the Simple Calendar Pro app in a monthly view for October. The calendar grid shows various events scheduled on different days. The date October 18 is visible in the middle of the screen, with events titled "Volunteer" and "Meeting" listed on that day.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Navigate to October 18, 2023 → | Step 3: Check the schedule at 9:45 am | Step 4: Extract and format the event titles.

[Decision]
Based on the current plan step to navigate to October 18, 2023, I can see the cell for the 18th on the current monthly view. To check the specific schedule and time for 9:45 am, I need to open the daily view for that specific date. Therefore, I will tap on the cell for October 18.

[Memory]
Target date: October 18, 2023. Target time: 9:45 am. Event titles to extract: comma-separated list. Current month view shows Oct 18 has "Volunteer" and "Meeting".

[Observation]
The screen shows the daily schedule for "October 18 (Wed)". There are three events listed: "Volunteer cleanup" at 09:45 - 11:15, "Meeting with Alice" at 14:55 - 15:10, and "Call with the Team" at 16:14 - 17:14.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Navigate to October 18, 2023 ✓ | Step 3: Check the schedule at 9:45 am ✓ | Step 4: Extract and format the event titles →

[Decision]
Based on the current plan step to extract and format the event titles for 9:45 am, I can see that the event scheduled at 09:45 is "Volunteer cleanup". The other events are at 14:55 and 16:14. The user's instruction asks for the title only, formatted as a comma-separated list if there are multiple. Since there is only one event at 9:45, I will provide just the title "Volunteer cleanup" to complete the task.

[Memory]
Target date: October 18, 2023. Target time: 9:45 am. Event found: "Volunteer cleanup" (09:45 - 11:15). Task is ready to be completed with this single title.
